items.front: Which ICAO region does ATC service under Section 8 of Chapter 8 cover?
What governs ATC procedures in the CAR ICAO Region when they differ from general Chapter 8 procedures?
items.back: Directives and letters of agreement may prescribe different procedures.

items.front: Where are vertical separation standards for the CAR ICAO Region found?
Where are longitudinal separation standards for the CAR ICAO Region found?
Where are lateral separation standards for the CAR ICAO Region found?
What specific guidance applies to COM/MET regulations in the CAR ICAO Region?
items.back: The CAR-SAM Planning and Implementation Regional Group (GREPECAS) may prescribe specific COM/MET regulations.
